atlas_description: Per-sample diversity / ROH / θπ landscape for the 226-sample pure C. gariepinus hatchery cohort. Decomposed from Diversity_atlas.html v2.4 (37 embedded tables, 8 page-level tabs). Round 2 added 'texture' (DDI + χ_min). Round 3 added 'burden' (VESM + πN/πS + π0/π4 + LOF + ROH-overlap), 'divergence' (FST/DXY/dA network), and an ROH × gene-model extension to 'roh' (cumulative burden stack + biotype × peak heatmap). 2026-05-19: pages renamed from page1..page11 to meaningful names (samples / chromosomes / hotspots / ancestry / roh / pruning_qc / about / roadmap / texture / burden / divergence) — see per-page README.md beside each module. All three round-3 payloads (functional_burden.json, roh_gene_overlap.json, divergence_network.json) remain optional and ship as empty stubs.

pages.label: samples
pages.tooltip: Per-sample table — H, F_ROH, ROH bins, θπ summaries. Click row for drill-down.

pages.label: chromosomes
pages.tooltip: Per-chromosome diversity — θπ + F_ROH + per-chromosome KW tests.

pages.label: hotspots
pages.tooltip: θπ outlier windows — 19 hotspots above 99th percentile, with per-sample heatmap.

pages.label: ancestry
pages.tooltip: Ancestry × diversity — K=8 clusters, K-sweep K=2-12, per-Q correlations, KW + pairwise tests.

pages.label: ROH
pages.tooltip: ROH composition — length-class bins, per-chr × per-sample F_ROH heatmap, length spectrum.

pages.label: pruning & QC
pages.tooltip: Pruning & QC — NAToRA pruning, ngsF-HMM stability, Spearman correlation matrix, het in/out ROH.

pages.label: about
pages.tooltip: About — methods (SD1-SD8), glossary, headline numbers, data lineage.

pages.label: roadmap
pages.tooltip: Roadmap — what's still planned but not yet shipped.

pages.label: texture
pages.tooltip: Per-sample texture — DDI (within-genome dispersion of H_w) and χ_min (cohort-relative diversity floor). Companion to the F_ROH|H framework on 'roh'.

pages.label: burden
pages.tooltip: Functional burden / selection efficacy — five co-located layers: VESM deleterious burden, πN/πS, π0/π4, LOF count, ROH-overlap fraction. Variant inventory by snpEff impact class, GERP panel (off by default), transcript view, MSA panel. Stratified by K=8 / family / per-sample / F_ROH-quartile via a shared pill toggle (also used by 'roh').

pages.label: divergence
pages.tooltip: Group-divergence network — node-link plot, nodes = K=8 ancestry groups (or per-farm / sex / karyotype), edges = pairwise FST / DXY / dA, edge thickness ∝ divergence. Circular layout default, force-directed toggle. Customisable edge filter (caret menu).

_stylesheets_doc: Round-1 ships one bundle (verbatim extraction of the legacy <style> block). Future work: split into per-page stylesheets (atlases/diversity/css/pages/<name>.css) and reference them from each page entry's `stylesheet` field — the router loads page-stylesheet on mount.
_scope_pickers_doc: No per-atlas scope pickers in round 1 — every page reads from the embedded_tables.json snapshot. When per-chromosome or per-cohort scope arrives, add pickers here (mirrors inversion-atlas activeChrom).
